problem_statement: We want to introduce a premium customer segment with differentiated behavior.
goal: To create a distinct set of features and support tailored to premium customers.
acceptance_criteria: Define specific behaviors and needs of premium customers.
Develop feature enhancements tailored for premium customers.
Implement a support system that caters to the unique needs of premium customers.
constraints: Must integrate with existing customer segmentation.
Resources for premium segment must be justified by potential revenue.
unknowns: What specific features will differentiate the premium segment?
What is the expected increase in revenue from premium customers?
